title: Active Directory domain login outage
safe_steps: Do not make domain-wide changes from user workstation.
advanced_steps: Check DC health, DNS SRV records, time sync, replication, event logs, network path.
do_not_do: Do not run destructive commands without approval.
Do not ask users to share passwords.
escalation: Always escalate immediately if multiple users affected or DC health is unknown.
technician_notes: Confirm scope: one user, multiple users, or full site.
Record final fix into the client-specific KB.
source_basis: Integrated IT Support original support workflow
